---
is-author-page: true
disable-spanning: true

author: "Rana Polat Sönmez"

author-bio: >
   Yazar.

author-links:
  - icon: globe
    text: "Yazıları"
    href: "https://halkweb.com.tr/"

listing:
  contents: .
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, title, date, description]
---
